title: Cosmos Remix — Torus you can retune and reskin live
summary: Remixable 3D particle torus: a glowing donut of points sitting on a torus surface (two angles derived from each particle's index), rotated around the X and Y axes as time advances and projected orthographically to 2D, with depth mapped to size and brightness so it reads as a spinning solid of light. Live glass panel retunes palette/shape/density/speed/size plus a Thickness knob, and reskins to any brand colour. Self-contained, zero deps; ?auto=1 hides the panel and renders a deterministic seamless loop.
usage_notes: RUN: open and use the panel (top-right) to retune live — pick a palette to reskin to any brand colour, drag Density/Spread/Speed/Dot, set Thickness for a fat or thin tube, ↻ Seed to shuffle, ⧉ Copy to copy your config. KEY TECHNIQUES: points are placed on a torus surface with two angles stepped by coprime golden increments for even coverage, then rotated around Y (spin) and X (wobble) and projected orthographically (X2,Y2); the rotated z-depth drives both particle size and alpha so nearer points are larger and brighter; all rotation is driven by 2πu so the loop is seamless; window.__params + setParam(key,value) is the contract a generic remix harness uses to auto-build panels; theme tokens = a PALETTES map driving both a CSS accent var and the dot ramp. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 hides panel + window.__seek(t). TUNE: Thickness sets the minor radius, Spread the major radius; add palettes to PALETTES.
